title: 有馬記念の後に・逃げて逃げて逃げた

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky seizes victory at the Arima Kinen and
receives generous praise from her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd doesn't skip out on the adoration
either. But instead of calling her a trickster,
they're claiming that, beyond a shadow of a
doubt, she's a first-rate Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear now that Seiun Sky has managed to reel
in the biggest catch there is. Now, all that's left is
to continue her racing career under the spotlight
of popularity.
